name: Abaddon
description: The fog of war is no match for the mist of fate.

abilities.name: Withering Mist
abilities.description: Damage instances applied by Abaddon applies a dormant debuff that activates when the affected enemy unit is below the max health threshold. The higher the Abaddon's level, the greater the applied health restore reduction value. Max Health Threshold: 40%. Debuff Duration: 5. Health Restore Reduction: 24.5%. Health Restore Reduction Increase: 0.5%.

abilities.name: Mist Coil
abilities.description: Damages an enemy unit or heals an allied unit, at the cost of some of Abaddon's health. Deals a non-lethal self pure damage instance per ability cast. Cast Range: 625. Damage: 95/170/245/320 (130/205/280/355). Ally Heal: 95/170/245/320 (130/205/280/355). Self Damage Factor: 0.4. Radius: 350. Cooldown: 8/7/6/5. Mana Cost: 50/55/60/65.

abilities.name: Aphotic Shield
abilities.description: Applies a strong dispel, and creates a barrier to absorbs a set amount of damage before expiring on the affected allied unit. Cast Range: 550. Duration: 12. Health Regen Bonus: (8). Damage Radius: 675. Damage: 120/150/180/210 (200/230/260/290). Reflect Radius: (675). Cooldown: 12/10/8/6. Mana Cost: 110/120/130/140.

abilities.name: Curse of Avernus
abilities.description: Applies a debuff that damages over time and slows the movement speed slow of the affected enemy unit. Grants all allied units bonus attack speed upon attacking the affected enemy unit. Move Speed Slow: 10%/15%/20%/25%. Damage per Second: 15/25/35/45 (40/50/60/70). Debuff Duration: 2. Attack Speed Bonus: 10/20/30/40 (75/85/95/105). Buff Duration: 2.

abilities.name: Borrowed Time
abilities.description: The most unnatural of all the gifts of the Font of Avernus, this power defies mortal understanding. What should hurt, instead heals; and what should kill gives strength anew. Damage Received to Heal: 100%. Duration: 4/5/6 (7/8/9). Current Health Threshold: 400. Damage Radius: 400. Damage per Second: 100. Self Damage Factor: 1. Cooldown: 85/75/65.
